$schema-note: RD-0361 R4 AUTHORITY LEDGER. A twin listed here is AUTHORITATIVE: its .fungi/WASM is the decider of record; the co-located .ts is demoted to a differential SHADOW (it keeps running and its execution-cutover test keeps asserting WASM===.ts, so any divergence is a RED alarm) for a bake window, and is deleted only post-bake. A twin is added here ONLY on the OWNER's condition-form nod over its evidence pack. scripts/audit-kernel-fungi-twins.mjs reads this ledger and ENFORCES, fail-closed, that every authoritative twin stays check-clean AND still differential (its execution-cutover test references it + admitAndInstantiate): an authoritative twin that regresses to shadow, or fails `galerina check`, is a RED gate — the trust-root fail-open this ledger exists to prevent. A malformed ledger is itself RED (deny-by-default).
protocol: RD-0361 R4 authority flip · shadow-bake (R&D feca65e: existing differential harness, authority inverted; keep the .ts one bake window before deleting)
